result.stdout:
Silent.Tool.Hexagonal.Cli v1.2.0

Usage
  dotnet Silent.Tool.Hexagonal.Cli.dll [command] [options]

  ... add service <servicename> [options]
  ... add webapp <webappname> [options]
  ... init <projectname> [options]
  ... config list [options]
  ... config set --key <value> --value <value> [options]

Options
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information. 

Commands
  add service
  add webapp
  init
  config list
  config set

You can run `dotnet Silent.Tool.Hexagonal.Cli.dll [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.
